itunes_results.name: Wim Hof Method
itunes_results.category: breathwork and cold exposure coaching — focuses on breathing exercises with cold as secondary; no dedicated cold shower streak gamification

itunes_results.name: Streaks
itunes_results.category: general habit tracker — tracks any habit including cold showers but not cold-shower-specific, no community or progression mechanics

itunes_results.name: Atomic Habits Companion
itunes_results.category: general habit accountability app — cold shower is one of many habits, no niche cold exposure streak system

itunes_results.name: Cold Turkey Blocker
itunes_results.category: website/app blocker for productivity — completely unrelated to cold shower habit tracking

daily_cold_shower_streak.notes: 436K cold shower/cold exposure community. Wim Hof covers breathing, Streaks is generic. No app specifically gamifies the daily cold shower habit with streak/XP/temperature logging and community challenges.

itunes_results.name: Wim Hof Method
itunes_results.category: SOFT — dedicated breathwork app with session logging and some streak elements for Wim Hof breathing technique

itunes_results.name: Othership: Breathwork & Cold
itunes_results.category: SOFT — guided breathwork sessions with community features and streak tracking for consistency

itunes_results.name: Breathwrk - Breathing Exercises
itunes_results.category: SOFT — structured breathing patterns with reminders and session tracking — partial streak functionality

itunes_results.name: Oak - Meditation & Breathing
itunes_results.category: combined meditation and breathing app with session counting — no dedicated streak gamification

daily_breathwork_streak.notes: 989K breathwork/meditation community. Wim Hof, Othership, and Breathwrk all have partial streak features. Gap: none combine full streak gamification (XP, levels, achievement badges) with multi-technique breathwork across a broad community.

itunes_results.name: Sleep Cycle - Sleep Tracker
itunes_results.category: sleep quality tracker and smart alarm — measures sleep cycles but does not gamify the bedtime ROUTINE habit with streak accountability

itunes_results.name: Calm - Sleep & Meditation
itunes_results.category: broad mindfulness content platform — sleep sounds and stories, not a bedtime routine habit streak system

itunes_results.name: Headspace: Sleep & Meditation
itunes_results.category: sleep meditation content library — guided exercises not daily routine streak gamification

itunes_results.name: BetterSleep: Sleep tracker
itunes_results.category: sleep sounds and binaural beats app — ambient audio tool, not a daily sleep routine habit streak

daily_sleep_routine_streak.notes: 1.09M sleep community. All apps track sleep quality or deliver sleep content. No app gamifies the daily BEDTIME ROUTINE habit (phone down by X, no caffeine after Y, same bed/wake time) with streak/XP mechanics.

itunes_results.name: StretchIt - Flexibility Training
itunes_results.category: SOFT — structured flexibility training program with session progress tracking — partial streak but program-based not habit-based

itunes_results.name: Down Dog: Great Yoga Anywhere
itunes_results.category: SOFT — customizable yoga/stretching classes with activity history — session completion tracking, limited streak gamification

itunes_results.name: Stretching & Flexibility: bend!
itunes_results.category: guided stretch routines app — follow-along content, no streak or habit gamification

itunes_results.name: ROMWOD - Daily Flexibility
itunes_results.category: daily mobility video subscription — content delivery, minimal streak accountability mechanics

daily_stretching_streak.notes: 890K flexibility/yoga community. StretchIt and Down Dog have session tracking. Gap: no app built purely around daily stretching HABIT with streak/XP/level-up and time-based consistency rewards.

itunes_results.name: 18Birdies Golf GPS App
itunes_results.category: GPS scorecard and stat tracking for rounds — round-based analytics, not daily practice habit streak gamification

itunes_results.name: Golfshot: Golf GPS + Analytics
itunes_results.category: GPS navigation and shot tracking — round performance tool, no daily practice routine streak accountability

itunes_results.name: TheGrint: Golf GPS & Handicap
itunes_results.category: handicap tracker and round log — official handicap management, not daily practice habit streak

itunes_results.name: Golf Now: Tee Time Booking
itunes_results.category: tee time reservation platform — booking utility, completely unrelated to daily practice habit streaks

daily_golf_practice_streak.notes: 1.41M golf community. All apps track rounds or book tee times. No app gamifies the daily practice habit (putting drills, chipping reps, range sessions) with streak/XP for golfers.

itunes_results.name: Tennis Clash: Realistic 3D Game
itunes_results.category: mobile tennis video game — completely unrelated to real-world daily practice habit tracking

itunes_results.name: SwingVision: A.I. Tennis App
itunes_results.category: AI ball tracking and match analysis — shot analytics for actual matches, not daily habit streak accountability

itunes_results.name: PlayYourCourt
itunes_results.category: tennis lesson and court booking platform — service marketplace, not daily practice habit streak gamification

itunes_results.name: Swing - Tennis Workout
itunes_results.category: tennis fitness conditioning app — general fitness for tennis, not daily on-court practice streak gamification

daily_tennis_practice_streak.notes: 982K tennis community. Clash is a game, SwingVision tracks matches, PlayYourCourt books lessons. Zero apps gamify the daily PRACTICE habit (serving drills, footwork, ball machine) with streak/XP for tennis players.

itunes_results.name: BJJ Fanatics
itunes_results.category: instructional video subscription for BJJ — content delivery platform, not daily practice habit streak gamification

itunes_results.name: Grappling Ronda: Jiu Jitsu
itunes_results.category: BJJ technique library with limited note-taking — reference tool, no streak or habit gamification

itunes_results.name: Martial Arts & Self Defense
itunes_results.category: technique video library for multiple martial arts — passive content consumption, no daily habit streak

itunes_results.name: Gracie Barra App
itunes_results.category: BJJ school class scheduling and attendance tracking — school management utility, not habit streak gamification

daily_martial_arts_streak.notes: 2.28M martial arts community (BJJ, MMA, general MA). All apps are instructional videos or school management. No app gamifies the daily training habit (drilling, sparring, conditioning) with streak/XP for martial artists.

itunes_results.name: Strava: Run, Ride, Hike
itunes_results.category: SOFT — activity tracking with segment challenges and activity streak features — strong streak mechanics but broad fitness platform not cycling-specific habit system

itunes_results.name: TrainerRoad - Cycling Fitness
itunes_results.category: SOFT — structured training plan platform with consistency tracking — workout completion tracked, limited streaks

itunes_results.name: Wahoo Fitness: Bike Training
itunes_results.category: cycling sensor and training data platform — device companion app, limited habit streak accountability

itunes_results.name: Zwift: Run and Cycling App
itunes_results.category: virtual indoor cycling with badges/achievements — gamified but requires subscription hardware, not a daily outdoor cycling streak app

daily_cycling_training_streak.notes: 2.5M cycling community. Strava has real streak features and large user base. Gap: Strava is broad fitness — no cycling-specific daily habit streak app with XP for consistency, not just ride logging.

itunes_results.name: Microsoft Excel
itunes_results.category: full-featured spreadsheet application — productivity tool, not a daily Excel skill-building streak gamification system

itunes_results.name: DataCamp: Learn Data Skills
itunes_results.category: data science and analytics learning platform — courses with XP but broad platform not Excel-specific daily habit streak

itunes_results.name: LinkedIn Learning: Career Skills
itunes_results.category: professional skills video library — content catalog, no daily Excel skill habit streak with gamification

itunes_results.name: Excel Tutorials - Spreadsheet
itunes_results.category: tutorial video library for Excel — passive learning content, no daily practice streak accountability

daily_excel_skills_streak.notes: 1.07M Excel/spreadsheet community. All apps are the software itself or passive learning content. No app gamifies daily Excel skill practice (one formula, one pivot table, one macro) with streak/XP and beginner-to-expert leveling.

itunes_results.name: Never Split the Difference App
itunes_results.category: Chris Voss negotiation content and techniques library — reference app for methods, no streak habit gamification

itunes_results.name: Pitch - Sales Training & CRM
itunes_results.category: sales CRM and coaching platform — deal management tool, not daily negotiation skill habit streak

itunes_results.name: Negotiation Academy
itunes_results.category: VERY SMALL — negotiation technique courses — course content delivery, no gamified daily practice streak

itunes_results.name: Persuasion Pro - Sales Training
itunes_results.category: persuasion and sales technique training — passive video content, no daily habit streak accountability

daily_negotiation_skills_streak.notes: 370K negotiation/sales community. Reference apps and CRMs dominate. No app gamifies the daily negotiation skill practice (scenario roleplay, tactic drills) with streak/XP and real-world challenge logging.

itunes_results.name: BetterUp: Professional Coaching
itunes_results.category: executive coaching and mentorship platform — high-cost coaching service not daily self-directed habit streak gamification

itunes_results.name: MindTools
itunes_results.category: management and leadership resource library — article/tool reference, no streak or gamification

itunes_results.name: Coursera: Learn New Skills
itunes_results.category: university course platform — structured courses with completion tracking but not daily leadership habit streak

itunes_results.name: Ken Blanchard Leadership App
itunes_results.category: VERY SMALL — situational leadership model reference tool — niche corporate training aid, no streak gamification

daily_leadership_skills_streak.notes: 510K leadership/management community. BetterUp is expensive B2B coaching. No app gamifies daily leadership skill practice (giving feedback, running 1:1s, decision frameworks) with streak/XP for aspiring managers.

itunes_results.name: Marlee Signs: Sign Language
itunes_results.category: ASL phrase and word learning app — lesson-based content, no dedicated daily streak gamification with XP

itunes_results.name: ASL American Sign Language
itunes_results.category: ASL dictionary and reference app — lookup tool, not daily habit streak accountability

itunes_results.name: The ASL App
itunes_results.category: conversational phrase learning for ASL — content-focused, limited gamification and no streak mechanics

itunes_results.name: HandSpeak - ASL & Sign Language
itunes_results.category: comprehensive ASL reference and video dictionary — reference tool not daily practice streak gamification

daily_sign_language_streak.notes: 248K sign language community. Apps are dictionaries and phrase reference tools. No app gamifies daily ASL practice habit with streak/XP/leveling — Duolingo has no ASL course, leaving a clear gap.

itunes_results.name: Duolingo - Language Lessons
itunes_results.category: OCCUPIED — Arabic course with full daily streak gamification, XP, leagues, and achievement badges

itunes_results.name: Rosetta Stone: Learn Languages
itunes_results.category: OCCUPIED — comprehensive Arabic learning with daily lesson streaks and milestone tracking

itunes_results.name: Pimsleur: Learn Languages Fast
itunes_results.category: OCCUPIED — audio-based Arabic with daily lesson streak tracking and schedule reminders

itunes_results.name: Mango Languages
itunes_results.category: OCCUPIED — Arabic course via libraries with lesson completion tracking and progress streaks

daily_arabic_streak.notes: 380K Arabic learning community. Duolingo has Arabic with full streak system at 5.6M users. Rosetta Stone, Pimsleur, Mango all cover Arabic with streaks. Fully occupied — skip.

itunes_results.name: Duolingo - Language Lessons
itunes_results.category: SOFT — Esperanto course with daily streak gamification, though Esperanto is a minor language with limited active learners on platform

itunes_results.name: Lernu!
itunes_results.category: Esperanto learning platform — course content and community, minimal gamification and very small user base

itunes_results.name: Mondly: Learn Languages
itunes_results.category: language learning platform — no Esperanto course available; primarily covers major languages

itunes_results.name: Clozemaster: Language Learning
itunes_results.category: SOFT — cloze-test language practice including Esperanto with XP system — small but functional streak mechanics

daily_esperanto_streak.notes: 92K Esperanto community. Duolingo has an Esperanto course but the learner base is tiny and engagement low. Clozemaster covers it lightly. Gap: dedicated Esperanto habit streak app built for the serious conlang learner community.
